aliases.note: ABI1 is a core ABA signaling PP2C phosphatase; no exact KB node. Mapped to 'Abscisic Acid Signal' as the ABA signaling pathway proxy.
Composite of ABI4 and ABI5 (both ABA TFs). Both are in KB; mapped to ABI4 as representative. ABI5 also available if preferred.

ACS (ACC synthase) is an ethylene biosynthesis enzyme; not in KB. Mapped to ACO1 (ACC oxidase), the next step in ethylene biosynthesis, as closest mechanistic proxy. 'Ethylene' is an alternative treatment-analog mapping.
ANR1 is a MADS-box TF mediating the nitrate-induced lateral root response; no exact KB node. Mapped to 'Nitrate signaling ca' (nitrate signaling cascade).

Type-B ARRs are cytokinin-response TFs downstream of AHK receptors; no ARR node in KB. Mapped to AHK (cytokinin His-kinase receptor), the upstream module of the same CK two-component signaling pathway.
BZR TF family; BES1 (BZR2/BES1) is the canonical paralog of BZR1 and is in KB. Family match.
CKX2 is a member of the CKX (cytokinin oxidase/dehydrogenase) family; KB has the family-level node 'CKX'.
ATCTR1 is Arabidopsis prefix variant of CTR1.
DAO1 (DIOXYGENASE OF AUXIN OXIDATION 1) inactivates IAA; no exact KB node. Mapped to 'Auxin' since DAO1 directly controls auxin homeostasis.
SLR1 is a DELLA-family repressor in KB. 'Stabilized DELLAs' also available but represents a treated-state rather than the protein node.
GA is the standard abbreviation for Gibberellin; direct synonym match.
GATA23 (lateral-root founder-cell specification TF) has no close KB node; no GATA-family node present.
IPT5 (isopentenyltransferase 5) is a cytokinin biosynthesis gene; no IPT family node in KB. Mapped to 'Cytokinin' as the direct biosynthetic product/treatment analog.
Exact case-insensitive/format match ('Low_Nitrate' vs 'low nitrate').
Exact case-insensitive/format match ('Low_Phosphate' vs 'low phosphate').
MAX1 is SL biosynthesis (cytP450); not in KB. MAX2 (SL F-box receptor) is in KB; mapped as MAX-family proxy. 'Strigolactone' is an alternative treatment-analog mapping.
MAX3/CCD7 is SL biosynthesis; not in KB. Mapped to MAX2 as MAX-family proxy. 'Strigolactone' is an alternative treatment-analog mapping.
MAX4/CCD8 is SL biosynthesis; not in KB. Mapped to MAX2 as MAX-family proxy. 'Strigolactone' is an alternative treatment-analog mapping.
NLP7 is the master nitrate-sensing TF; no exact KB node. Mapped to 'Nitrate signaling ca' (nitrate signaling cascade).
PHYB is the standard abbreviation for Phytochrome B; direct synonym match.
PLT (PLETHORA family). KB has 'plt3plt5plt7 triple ' (PLT3/5/7 triple mutant) as the closest PLT-family node. Mapping preserves trailing space exactly as in KB.
SnRK2 kinases are the core ABA-signaling kinase module; no exact KB node. Mapped to 'Abscisic Acid Signal' (ABA signaling pathway).
TAA1 (TRYPTOPHAN AMINOTRANSFERASE OF ARABIDOPSIS) is in the TAA/TAR family; ATTAR2 (TAR2) is the paralogous family member in KB. 'Auxin' treatment-analog is a secondary option.
ATTAR2 is the Arabidopsis-prefix variant of TAR2.
YUC4 is a YUCCA auxin-biosynthesis family member; YUC9 is the only YUC-family node in KB. Family match. 'Auxin' treatment-analog is a secondary option.
